title: High stakes battle in Dhamdaha as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Dhamdaha. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Dhamdaha
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Dhamdaha assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Dhamdaha
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Dhamdaha constituency.
